steps.description: Click the "Start" button in the center panel of the "Todo List" tab within the "test-team" channel in Microsoft Teams (web app). The button is blue with white text and located below the welcome message "Welcome to To Do List App!" and user info.
Click the "Accept" button on the Microsoft Permissions requested dialog to grant access for the "toDoList-aad" application within the login.microsoftonline.com authorization page.
Click the "+ Add task" button in the "To Do List" tab within the "test-team" channel of the Microsoft Teams web application.
Type text: 'hello world' into the task input field in the "To Do List" section of the "test-team" tab within Microsoft Teams (web interface).
Press the Enter key in the "hello world" task input field of the "To Do List" tab within Microsoft Teams (test-team channel) to add a new task.
Click the empty task input field in the "To Do List" section of the Microsoft Teams web app, targeting where a new task can be entered.
Click the "Delete" option in the dropdown menu for a task item within the "To Do List" tab of a Microsoft Teams web app interface.
